disagreements.chief_strategist_resolution: Use most conservative CIO manual review posture when agents disagree.
Preserve deterministic operator blocks and escalate risk items to CIO review.

agents.agent_role: Interpret concentration, cash, cluster exposure, HHI, largest position, and top exposures.
agents.summary: Portfolio shows high concentration risk with multiple position integrity conflicts requiring immediate attention. Cash weight is 94.83% but concentration HHI (equity-only) is 29.21% indicating significant concentration risk. All positions have CIO-only execution authority and tactical/satellite mandates.
key_findings: Concentration risk: HHI (equity-only) = 29.21% (above 20% threshold for concentrated portfolios)
Cash weight = 94.83% (within min_cash_weight=5% constraint but high liquidity risk)
3 positions have unrealized PNL conflicts: QBTS, LUNR, QUBT (broker vs computed unrealized PNL differences >$5)
risk_flags: CONCENTRATED
PNL_INTEGRITY_CONFLICTS
HIGH_CASH_WEIGHT
blocked_actions_observed: All positions have research-only mandates requiring CIO approval for any changes
No position breaches max_single_name_weight (0.3) or max_theme_weight (0.45) constraints
allowed_actions_observed: Can adjust cash allocation within 5% minimum constraint
Can resolve PNL conflicts by verifying cost basis in moomoo
affected_theses: Concentration risk thesis: Portfolio is concentrated (HHI=29.21%)
PNL integrity thesis: 3 positions have significant unrealized PNL conflicts
blind_spots: No historical volatility data for accurate VaR calculation
Lack of daily volume data for position liquidity assessment

agents.agent_role: Interpret market narrative, risk appetite, panic or euphoria tone, and narrative rotation.
